qa_pairs.question: What was the purpose of the scheduled outage at the SciNet Datacenter from November 7 to November 8, 2024, and which systems were affected?
qa_pairs.answer: The outage at the SciNet Datacenter from 7 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET on November 7-8, 2024, was necessary for installing new electrical equipment (UPS) as part of a systems refresh. All systems and storage at the datacenter were unavailable, including Niagara, Mist, HPSS, Rouge, Teach, JupyterHub, and Balam.

qa_pairs.question: What guidance was given to users regarding job submissions before the SciNet Datacenter outage on November 7-8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: Users were encouraged to submit smaller, short-duration jobs to optimize idle node usage before the maintenance began. The scheduler would pause any jobs that were unable to finish before the shutdown.
